creator: vans9@yandex.ru
text:
Trying updating/installing opera-12.16_3 fails with:
/usr/ports/www/opera # make install
===>  Found saved configuration for opera-12.16
...
===>   Generating temporary packing list
install  -o root -g wheel -m 555 /tmp/pwrk//usr/ports/www/opera/work/opera-12.16-1860.amd64.freebsd/opera /tmp/pwrk//usr/ports/www/opera/work/stage/usr/local/bin/
/usr/bin/tar -C /tmp/pwrk//usr/ports/www/opera/work/opera-12.16-1860.amd64.freebsd -cf - lib man share | /usr/bin/tar -C /tmp/pwrk//usr/ports/www/opera/work/stage/usr/local -xf -
install  -s -o root -g wheel -m 444 /tmp/pwrk//usr/ports/www/opera/work/opera-12.16-1860.amd64.freebsd/libstdc++.so.6 /tmp/pwrk//usr/ports/www/opera/work/stage/usr/local/lib/opera
install  -o root -g wheel -m 0644 /usr/ports/www/opera/files/libmap.conf  /tmp/pwrk//usr/ports/www/opera/work/stage/usr/local/etc/libmap.d/opera.conf
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
===>  Installing for opera-12.16_3
===>  Checking if opera already installed
===>   Registering installation for opera-12.16_3
pkg-static: lstat(/tmp/pwrk//usr/ports/www/opera/work/stage/usr/local/%%LIBSTDC%%lib/opera/libstdc++.so.6): No such file or directory
*** Error code 74

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/www/opera
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/www/opera


# freebsd-version 
10.0-RELEASE-p7
